title: baccharis myricifolia var. xylophylla
intro: Baccharis myricifolia var. xylophylla, also known as False Burr Sage or Xylophylla, is a shrub-like plant native to South America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Baccharis myricifolia var. xylophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
